underlying_goal: Get opinions on testing setup (Capybara vs Playwright) and get a code review of a PR consolidating CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md
friction_detail: Claude was overly cautious about .claude/CLAUDE.md symlink validity in the PR review, prompting user to question the review feedback.
brief_summary: User asked for a Capybara vs Playwright comparison and a PR code review; Claude provided both but made an inaccurate concern about .claude/CLAUDE.md that the user challenged.
